### Bergamot Translation (295 models — 42 language pairs bidirectional)

```
BERGAMOT_{LANG}_EN         — 37 source languages to English
BERGAMOT_EN_{LANG}         — 32 English to target languages
BERGAMOT_{LANG}_EN_LEX     — lexical shortlists (per pair)
BERGAMOT_{LANG}_EN_VOCAB   — vocabularies (per pair)
BERGAMOT_METADATA*         — model metadata (74 entries)
```

Supported languages: az, be, bg, bn, bs, ca, da, de, el, et, fa, fi, gu, he, hi,
hr, hu, id, is, kn, ko, lt, lv, ml, ms, mt, nb, nl, nn, pl, ro, sk, sl, sq, sr,
sv, ta, te, tr, uk, vi.
